name: HOVNANIAN ENTERPRISES INC
business: HEI designs, constructs, markets, and sells single-family detached homes, attached townhomes and condominiums, urban infill, and active lifestyle homes in planned residential developments. It also provides mortgage loans and title services to the customers of its homebuilding operations.

exposures.sentence: Through its subsidiaries, HEI designs, constructs, markets, and sells single-family detached homes, attached townhomes and condominiums, urban infill, and active lifestyle homes in planned residential developments and is one of the nation s largest builders of residential homes.

catalysts.sentence: Effective January 1, 2026, we plan to reinstate the tuition reimbursement benefit, which has been suspended since May 2009.
